structured_fields.name: genetic_causes
structured_fields.description: Known genetic mutations or hereditary factors linked to the disease

structured_fields.name: environmental_factors
structured_fields.description: Environmental or lifestyle contributors such as diet, toxins, occupation

structured_fields.name: infectious_autoimmune_triggers
structured_fields.description: Known infectious agents or autoimmune mechanisms that trigger or worsen the disease

structured_fields.name: comorbidities
structured_fields.description: Conditions that commonly co-occur or predispose patients to this disease

structured_fields.name: risk_score_by_factor
structured_fields.description: Relative risk contribution of each factor category — used for chart rendering

freetext_fields.name: narrative
freetext_fields.description: 2-3 paragraph clinical narrative explaining how these factors interact and contribute to disease onset

freetext_fields.name: key_triggers
freetext_fields.description: One concise paragraph on the most clinically significant triggers — what pushes a predisposed patient into active disease

charts.title: Relative Risk by Factor Category
charts.caption: Higher values indicate stronger association with disease onset

mermaid.instruction: Generate a Mermaid flowchart showing how genetic predisposition, environmental triggers, and immune dysregulation converge to cause disease onset. Use graph TD direction.

avoid: overly generic statements like 'lifestyle factors play a role'
prefer: specific named genetic loci or mutations where known
